languages.text: "Не знаю, как вам, а мне не по себе, когда машины эти вижу. Иглы, пилы, колбы, сущий страх. Будто на живодерне какой, или в пыточной. И больно, наверное, не меньше".

traits.locale_text: "Не знаю, как вам, а мне не по себе, когда машины эти вижу. Иглы, пилы, колбы, сущий страх. Будто на живодёрне какой, или в пыточной. И больно, наверное, не меньше".

languages.text: "I don't know about you, but seeing those machines turns my stomach. Needles, saws, vials — terrifying. It's like being in an abattoir or a torture chamber. And it probably hurts just as much."
languages.original_text: "Не знаю, как вам, а мне не по себе, когда машины эти вижу. Иглы, пилы, колбы, сущий страх. Будто на живодерне какой, или в пыточной. И больно, наверное, не меньше".

traits.locale_text: "I don't know about you, but seeing those machines turns my stomach. Needles, saws, vials — terrifying. It's like being in an abattoir or a torture chamber. And it probably hurts just as much."
"I don't know about you, but seeing those machines turns my stomach. Needles, saws, vials — terrifying. It's like being in an abattoir or a torture chamber. And it probably hurts just as much."
"I don't know about you, but seeing those machines turns my stomach. Needles, saws, vials — terrifying. It's like being in an abattoir or a torture chamber. And it probably hurts just as much."

languages.text: 「あなたはどうかわからないけど、私、あの機械を見るだけで気持ち悪くなるわ。注射器、ノコギリ、薬瓶…恐ろしいわ。屠殺場や拷問室にいるみたい。きっと同じくらい痛いのよ」
languages.original_text: "I don't know about you, but seeing those machines turns my stomach. Needles, saws, vials — terrifying. It's like being in an abattoir or a torture chamber. And it probably hurts just as much."

languages.text: "Sizi bilmem ama o makineleri görmek midemi bulandırıyor. İğneler, testereler, şişeler... Korkunç. Bir mezbahada ya da işkence odasında olmak gibi. Muhtemelen epey acıtıyordur da."
languages.original_text: "I don't know about you, but seeing those machines turns my stomach. Needles, saws, vials — terrifying. It's like being in an abattoir or a torture chamber. And it probably hurts just as much."

traits.locale_text: "Sizi bilmem ama o makineleri görmek midemi bulandırıyor. İğneler, testereler, şişeler... Korkunç. Bir mezbahada ya da işkence odasında olmak gibi. Muhtemelen epey acıtıyordur da."

languages.text: “不知道你们怎么想，反正我看见那些机器就反胃。针头、锯子、药瓶——简直像屠宰场或刑讯室。恐怕疼起来也一样要命。”
languages.original_text: "I don't know about you, but seeing those machines turns my stomach. Needles, saws, vials — terrifying. It's like being in an abattoir or a torture chamber. And it probably hurts just as much."

traits.locale_text: “不知道你们怎么想，反正我看见那些机器就反胃。针头、锯子、药瓶——简直像屠宰场或刑讯室。恐怕疼起来也一样要命。”

languages.text: "Ich weiß ja nicht, wie's dir geht, aber von diesen Maschinen wird mir übel. Nadeln, Sägen, Phiolen ... schrecklich. Als wären wir in einem Schlachthaus oder einer Folterkammer. Und es ist vermutlich genauso schmerzhaft."
languages.original_text: "I don't know about you, but seeing those machines turns my stomach. Needles, saws, vials — terrifying. It's like being in an abattoir or a torture chamber. And it probably hurts just as much."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß ja nicht, wie's dir geht, aber von diesen Maschinen wird mir übel. Nadeln, Sägen, Phiolen ... schrecklich. Als wären wir in einem Schlachthaus oder einer Folterkammer. Und es ist vermutlich genauso schmerzhaft."

languages.text: « Je ne sais pas pour vous, mais rien que la vue de ces machines me donne la nausée. Toutes ces aiguilles, ces scies, ces fioles… C'est terrifiant. J'ai l'impression d'être dans un abattoir ou une salle de torture. Probablement que ça fait aussi mal. »
languages.original_text: "I don't know about you, but seeing those machines turns my stomach. Needles, saws, vials — terrifying. It's like being in an abattoir or a torture chamber. And it probably hurts just as much."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne sais pas pour vous, mais rien que la vue de ces machines me donne la nausée. Toutes ces aiguilles, ces scies, ces fioles… C'est terrifiant. J'ai l'impression d'être dans un abattoir ou une salle de torture. Probablement que ça fait aussi mal. »

languages.text: «No sé a ti, pero esas máquinas me dan repelús. Agujas, sierras, viales... es espantoso. Como un matadero, o una cámara de torturas. Y probablemente duela por el estilo».
languages.original_text: "I don't know about you, but seeing those machines turns my stomach. Needles, saws, vials — terrifying. It's like being in an abattoir or a torture chamber. And it probably hurts just as much."

traits.locale_text: «No sé a ti, pero esas máquinas me dan repelús. Agujas, sierras, viales... es espantoso. Como un matadero, o una cámara de torturas. Y probablemente duela por el estilo».
